tickets.issue_summary: Dell Latitude laptop overheating and shutting down randomly during video calls
tickets.issue_details: Dell Latitude laptop is overheating and shutting down randomly during video calls. This is high priority as I have important client demos this week.

tickets.issue_summary: Workstation GPU issues - crashes during 3D rendering
tickets.issue_details: Main rendering workstation Dell Precision 7920 with NVIDIA Quadro RTX 8000 and 256GB RAM keeps crashing during 3D rendering jobs. System has dual Xeon processors and runs Windows 11 Pro. Priority: Critical due to a project deadline tomorrow.
tickets.raw_request:
From: tech.lead@company.com
Subject: Workstation GPU Issues

Hey IT,

I'm the tech lead for the design team (EMP-8934). Our main rendering workstation
(Dell Precision 7920 with NVIDIA Quadro RTX 8000, 256GB RAM) keeps crashing during
3D rendering jobs. Critical priority - we have a project deadline tomorrow!

The system has dual Xeon processors and runs Windows 11 Pro.

Contact: maria.santos@company.com or 555-0199

Maria Santos
